# Fremont

> Geotechnical engineering company in United States, providing professional services in soil mechanics, foundation engineering and site investigation.

## Services
- [Active Passive Anchor Design](https://fremont.geotechnicalengineering1.biz/active-passive-anchor-design/)
- [Base Isolation Seismic Design](https://fremont.geotechnicalengineering1.biz/base-isolation-seismic-design/)
- [Bearing Capacity Analysis](https://fremont.geotechnicalengineering1.biz/bearing-capacity-analysis/)

- [Driven Pile Design](https://fremont.geotechnicalengineering1.biz/driven-pile-design/)

## About
This page provides information about geotechnical engineering services available in United States.
The company complies with local and international standards including ASTM, ISO and country-specific norms.
